gt_provenance.details: GT loaded from data/*.npz dataset files (src/data/dataset.py:77-81), not from model outputs

score_normalization.details: All metrics use standard formulas (MSE, MAE, R2, IoU, SSIM, PSNR), no normalization tricks found

result_existence.details: All 5 result files exist with consistent values. Checkpoint loadable.

dead_code.details: All metric functions in evaluate.py are called via compute_all_metrics()

scope.details: Metrics computed on 100-sample subset (not full 4500). Early stopped at epoch 35/90.

claims.text: Model trains and converges on all 5 tasks
Metrics from subset only, need full test set for publication-level numbers
Training loss decreases monotonically as expected
